# Linting Instructions Notice


Linting rules are intentionally maintained in each language instruction file as the single source of truth for that language.

Use:
- `.github/instructions/languages/python/python.instructions.md`
- `.github/instructions/languages/bash.instructions.md`
- `.github/instructions/languages/typescript.instructions.md`
- `.github/instructions/languages/rust.instructions.md`
- `.github/instructions/languages/groovy.instructions.md`
- `.github/instructions/languages/r.instructions.md`
- `.github/instructions/languages/nextflow/nextflow.instructions.md`

This file is only a navigation pointer to avoid duplicated linting definitions.
